title: Java NIO File IO
description: Build a Path and read or write whole files with the java.nio.file API.
learningGoals: Create a Path and write or read an entire file with Files.writeString and Files.readString (Java 11).
Query the file system with Files.exists.

completionChecks.prompt: Which API creates notes in this lesson?
completionChecks.explanation: The NIO.2 API uses Path to model file-system locations before Files operations read or write them.

choices: Whether the path currently exists in the file system
Whether the file has exactly two lines
Whether the path is a classpath resource
completionChecks.explanation: Files.exists asks the file system about that Path; it does not inspect the file contents or classpath.

completionChecks.prompt: What does the println statement print if the write and read succeed?
completionChecks.explanation: String.lines counts the two text lines; the trailing line terminator does not create a third content line.
